member.name: T:Telegrator.States.RedisStateStorage
member.summary: Provides a Redis-based implementation of the interface. Serializes state objects to JSON format before storing them in the Redis database.

member.name: M:Telegrator.States.RedisStateStorage.#ctor(StackExchange.Redis.IConnectionMultiplexer)
member.summary: Provides a Redis-based implementation of the interface. Serializes state objects to JSON format before storing them in the Redis database.
